summary: Iteration 33 — Cloud sync (Pro-only) backend + frontend gating validated. All 8 pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/test_sync.py pass (pytest-asyncio 1.3.0 with --asyncio-mode=auto). All 4 live /api/sync/* endpoints correctly return 401 Not authenticated (routes wired, not missing). Signed-out user on /app does NOT see [data-testid='sync-badge'], sign-in button visible, 6 nodes render (Core Concept + Idea One..Five). Studio regression: node select+Enter opens edit input, typing+Enter renames node (verified: Idea One → Renamed One). Landing hero 'Download' CTA (data-testid='hero-launch-btn') routes to /download; /download shows macOS, Windows, Linux panels. /intake?clip=... still renders PDF Studio page (graceful toast when clip missing from localStorage).
critical_code_review_comments: sync.py is clean: excludes _id in all find projections, Pydantic validates input, async throughout, pro-gating via _require_pro is correct (402 for non-pro).
Unique index (user_id, map_id) is properly created on each mount via _ensure_indexes() — idempotent.
LWW conflict resolution ties go to client (>= client.updated_at keeps client) which is correct for idempotent pushes.
Batch size cap of 200 per push prevents abuse — good.

purge_old_tombstones is standalone; main agent should schedule this on startup or a cron — no scheduler wiring observed but this is non-blocking (tombstones are harmless until purged, since filter keeps pulls cheap).
test_credentials: App gate unlock key: ?unlock=mind-mapper67. No signed-in user available; sync badge Pro path covered exclusively by pytest (test_push_then_pull_roundtrip, test_lww_keeps_server_newer, test_since_filter, test_delete_creates_tombstone, test_user_isolation).
seed_data_creation: pytest fixtures use a throwaway DB (DB_NAME + '_sync_tests') dropped after each test — no persistent test data left behind.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cloud sync feature shipped green. /api/sync/{status,maps,maps/:id} all return 401 unauthenticated (not 404). Pytest cmd: cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_sync.py -v --asyncio-mode=auto. Frontend sync-badge correctly hidden for !user || !isPro (returns null). Studio canvas nodes are plain DOM elements matchable by text content (no data-node-id attribute); node rename = click to select, then Enter (not dblclick, despite the 'DOUBLE-CLICK RENAME' footer hint — Enter also works and is the path the review requested). Landing hero CTA testid is 'hero-launch-btn' (not 'hero-download-cta').
